name: @act-spec/component-contract
description: PRD-300 component-instrumentation contract framework for the ACT (Agent Content Tree) v0.1 reference implementation. Defines the canonical contract object every framework binding (PRD-301 React, PRD-302 Vue, PRD-303 Angular) desugars into, the page-level aggregation rule, the variant emission protocol (PRD-102-R29-R32), the binding capability matrix (`ssr-walk`/`static-ast`/`headless-render`/`rsc`/`streaming`/`suspense`/`concurrent`), the placeholder-on-failure rule (PRD-102-R22), and the build-time safety stance (no sandbox, error truncation + secret-pattern redaction). Framework package: leaf bindings 301/302/303 import these types and helpers; this package emits no nodes itself.
